---
title: "Singular Spectrum Analysis"
subtitle: "A method of time series decomposition and analysis"
author: "Sidak Kalra"
date: today
engine: julia

format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
    css: styles.css
    grid:
      margin-width: 400px
    fontsize: 1.05rem
    linestretch: 1.6
    toc: true
    html-math-method: katex
    code-tools: true
    output-file: "index.html"

#   pdf:
#     pdf-engine: xelatex
#     documentclass: scrartcl
#     fontsize: 11pt
#     linestretch: 1.15
#     toc: true

execute:
  echo: fenced

reference-location: margin
citation-location: margin
---

# Introduction

Singular Spectrum analysis (SSA) is a time series analysis method with unique features. SSA is a non-parametric method that in its basic form has two main stages: Decomposition and Reconstruction. 

{{< pagebreak >}}
